examples: This paper discussed the influence on the biochemical oxygen demand, ammoniation and nitrosation by barium of different levels in water.
Moreover, by analyzing the changes of microstructure and fiber content of rice straw ammoniated, the mechanism of ammoniation was discussed.
The newly-prepared wheat straw ammoniated-ensilage fodder (WSAEF) synthesized advantages of the ammoniation and ensilage, as a type of silage.
